article.body_preview:
CHATTOGRAM, Feb 24, 2023 (BSS) - The country would not face any shortage of essential commodities in the coming fasting month of Ramadan as the timely measures of the government have helped increase the imports of consumer goods significantly stabilizing the market with sufficient supply.

Also the adequate imports of commodities have helped wholesalers build sizable stocks ahead of the Ramadan, thanks to the government for easing opening letters of credit (LCs) for essential commodities to keep

llm_connections.evidence_quote: timely measures of the government have helped increase the imports of consumer goods
llm_connections.scope_justification: The quote refers to national-level imports of consumer goods driven by government measures, matching the feature's definition of country-wide import volume.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: adequate imports of commodities have helped wholesalers build sizable stocks ahead of the Ramadan, thanks to the government for easing opening letters of credit (LCs) for essential commodities
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly links eased Letter of Credit (LC) policy to increased commodity imports, matching the feature's LC-driven import volume scope.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: essential products against LCs opened recently have started coming to the market
llm_connections.scope_justification: This statement describes imported products arriving at market as a result of LCs opened, directly addressing country-level import flows described in the feature definition.
